ddls:
CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "database_type" TEXT /* Type of the database (e.g., relational, NoSQL) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the database */,
  "database_version" TEXT /* Version of the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the database was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the database */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the database (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_databases_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the client was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the client's information */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database object */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the object belongs to */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the database object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the database object (e.g., table, index, constraint) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the object */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the object in bytes */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the object was accessed or used */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_objects_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis type */,
  "impact_name" INTEGER /* ID of the impact level */,
  "rule_name" INTEGER /* ID of the rule applied */,
  "instance_count" INTEGER /* Count of instances where the rule was applied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analysis result */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the analysis result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_rule_name FOREIGN KEY ("rule_name") REFERENCES rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_type FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_type") REFERENCES analysis_types ("analysis_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_impact_name FOREIGN KEY ("impact_name") REFERENCES impacts ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_types" (
  "analysis_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis type */,
  "analysis_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analysis type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the analysis type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impacts" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact level */,
  "impact_name" TEXT /* Name of the impact level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the impact level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the impact level */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the impact level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the rule */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the rule (e.g., performance, security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_name FOREIGN KEY ("report_name") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the subscription was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
